title: Make gofvml feature-complete CLI and platform builds
description: Implement convert, compress, and upload subcommands in the primary gofvml binary while keeping helper binaries. Update Makefile so default builds gofvml, add tool and per-platform build targets, and document the new main CLI.
acceptance_criteria: gofvml exposes convert/compress/upload; Makefile supports build, build-tools, build-all, build-all-tools, and linux platform targets; helper binaries remain; tests and build gates pass.
close_reason: Implemented feature-complete gofvml convert/compress/upload subcommands, platform-specific Makefile targets, docs, and regression tests.

title: Fix review findings for process and upload workflows
description: Address review findings from the current branch: preserve process acquisition payload bytes in artifacts, make strict process acquisition fail on read errors, and honor zero upload retries without slow backoff tests.
acceptance_criteria: Process artifacts contain acquired payload bytes; strict process acquisition returns an error on read failure; upload Retries=0 performs one attempt with no retry backoff; regression tests and quality gates pass.
close_reason: Fixed process artifact payload preservation, strict read failure propagation, and zero upload retry semantics with regression tests.

title: Task 13: Upload Workflows
description: Implement HTTP PUT upload for local artifacts with progress events, post-acquisition upload, delete-after-upload, and local HTTP test server coverage.
close_reason: Implemented HTTP PUT upload with progress events, retry policy, delete-after-upload, cancellation support, and comprehensive test coverage including local HTTP test server.

title: Task 12: Library API and CLI Adapters
description: Implement library API and CLI adapters for physical acquisition, process acquisition, conversion, and upload workflows. Connect domain workflows to CLI commands.
close_reason: Implemented CLI adapters for physical acquisition, process acquisition, conversion, and upload workflows. All tests pass.

title: Fix remaining physical review edge cases
description: Address follow-up review findings: acquisition should error when no output blocks are written, including all-zero skipped ranges, and sparse encoded-to-raw conversion should reject gaps too large for io.CopyN int64 sizing instead of silently corrupting output.
close_reason: Fixed acquisition no-output semantics and sparse raw gap overflow guard with regression tests

title: Task 11: Process Artifact Format
description: Define gofvml-process-v1 file header and version metadata. Define process metadata schema including host, kernel, timestamp, PID, command line, executable path, mappings, options, and read events. Implement payload block writing with virtual address, mapping index, payload offset/length, compression type, and status. Implement artifact finalization using single-file EOF-index strategy. Implement minimal reader/validator for tests. Add round-trip tests and document format layout and compatibility limitations.
close_reason: Completed: defined gofvml-process-v1 artifact format with 32-byte header, payload blocks with virtual address/mapping index/compression/status, JSON metadata at EOF with footer index. Implemented WriteArtifact/ReadArtifact round-trip, DecodeArtifactHeader, WritePayloadBlock/ReadPayloadBlock. Added comprehensive tests: round-trip, empty blocks, invalid magic/version, truncated footer, large 1MiB block, mapping metadata preservation. All tests pass.

title: Task 10: Process Memory Acquisition
description: Define process acquisition options, per-process result, per-mapping result, and read event structures. Implement read-only /proc/<pid>/mem opening with privilege diagnostics. Implement chunked virtual memory reads for selected mappings. Record short reads, read errors, unmapped ranges, process exits, and mapping races. Implement non-strict mode (continue after failures, report partial success) and strict mode (fail PID on mapping read failure). Add controlled child-process tests and progress events.
close_reason: Completed: defined Options/Result/MappingResult/ReadEvent types, implemented Acquire with read-only /proc/pid/mem opening, chunked virtual memory reads, progress events, strict/non-strict modes, cancellation support. Added tests for self-acquisition, address filtering, progress events, invalid PID, read event helpers, no-mappings warning. Linux-only tests skip on non-Linux. All tests pass.

title: Task 9: Process Metadata and Mapping Selection
description: Implement procfs readers for process status, command line, executable path, maps, and Yama ptrace scope. Implement /proc/<pid>/maps parsing with start, end, permissions, offset, device, inode, and pathname. Implement default readable mapping selection and filters for permissions, virtual address ranges, pathname matching, and max bytes. Add tests and diagnostics for missing procfs files, zombie processes, and namespace gaps.
close_reason: Completed: implemented procfs readers (status, cmdline, exe, maps, yama ptrace scope), mapping parsing with all fields, default readable selection, filters (permissions, address ranges, pathname matching, max bytes), comprehensive tests for fixtures, special names, malformed lines, edge cases. All tests pass.

title: Fix physical acquisition review findings
description: Address review-blocking issues from Tasks 3/5/6/7/8: AVML framed payload/trailer layout, AVML 16 MiB splitting, sparse raw reconstruction, acquisition failure semantics, and race-detector test failure.
close_reason: Fixed AVML compatibility, splitting, sparse raw conversion, acquisition failure semantics, and race test

title: Implement image conversion workflow
description: Task 8: Implement format detection for raw/LiME/AVML-compressed inputs, raw-to-LiME and raw-to-AVML conversion with deterministic chunking and zero-chunk skipping, LiME-to-raw and AVML-to-raw with gap filling, cross-format conversion, same-format no-op detection. Add sparse round-trip tests, trailing skipped-zero tests, recompression tests, malformed input tests, cancellation tests, and progress events.
close_reason: Implemented format detection for raw/LiME/AVML with magic-based auto-detection and explicit format validation. Implemented raw-to-LiME, raw-to-AVML, LiME-to-raw, AVML-to-raw, LiME-to-AVML, and AVML-to-LiME conversions with deterministic chunking, zero-chunk skipping, and gap filling. Implemented same-format no-op detection. Added cancellation support, progress events, and byte-count tracking. Fixed AVML format to use header-trailer-payload order for sequential reading. Added comprehensive tests for all conversion paths, zero-block skipping, truncation, cancellation, auto-detect, and malformed input. All tests pass.

title: Implement image headers and encoders
description: Task 7: Implement LiME 32-byte header encode/decode with exclusive-end to inclusive-end conversion, AVML-compressed 32-byte header with version 2, Snappy-framed payload writing and 8-byte trailers, 16 MiB block splitting, all-zero block detection and omission. Add comprehensive tests for headers, compression, trailers, block splitting, zero-block omission, and malformed stream handling.
close_reason: Implemented LiME 32-byte header encode/decode with exclusive-end to inclusive-end conversion, comprehensive tests for magic/version/padding/range validation. Implemented AVML-compressed 32-byte header with version 2, Snappy-framed compression, 8-byte little-endian trailers, 16 MiB block splitting, all-zero block handling. Added round-trip tests, truncation tests, malformed stream tests, invalid magic/version tests. All tests pass.

title: Implement physical acquisition workflow
description: Task 6: Implement safe output file creation with 0600 permissions and symlink-safe behavior, disk usage estimation and preflight hooks, auto source fallback order (/dev/crash -> /proc/kcore -> /dev/mem), explicit source mode, physical block orchestration, unprivileged raw-source tests, and progress events.
close_reason: Implemented safe output file creation with O_EXCL|O_CREATE and 0600 permissions, directory creation, symlink protection. Implemented disk usage estimation with format-aware sizing. Implemented auto source fallback (/dev/crash -> /proc/kcore -> /dev/mem) and explicit source mode. Implemented physical block orchestration with cancellation support, progress events, zero-block skipping. Created acquisition package to avoid import cycles. Added comprehensive tests for LiME/AVML writing, zero-block skipping, safe output creation, progress events, cancellation, validation. All tests pass.

title: Implement physical source adapters
description: Task 5: Define memory source interface, implement raw/fake source adapters for unprivileged tests, implement /dev/mem, /dev/crash, and /proc/kcore source opening with page-aware reads and permission diagnostics. Add source availability tests and Linux build tags.
close_reason: Implemented memory source interface (Reader, Source, Availability, Info), FakeSource and FakeSourceAdapter for tests, RawSource and RawSourceAdapter for file/device reading, Linux-specific /dev/mem, /dev/crash, and /proc/kcore sources with ELF mapping support, stub implementations for non-Linux platforms, fallback and explicit source selection, ReadBlock/ReadBlocks helpers, cancellation support, comprehensive tests. All tests pass.

title: Implement shared types and diagnostics framework
description: Task 3: Define shared range/block types, structured diagnostic categories, warning/result conventions, CLI rendering helpers, cancellation test helpers, and diagnostic serialization tests. Foundation for physical acquisition, process acquisition, conversion, and upload workflows.
close_reason: Completed all subtasks: Block type in phys, structured diagnostic framework with categories/severity/JSON serialization, Result and Collection types, CLI rendering helpers, progress events, cancellation test helpers, comprehensive tests. All tests pass.

title: Fix review blockers from feature plan audit
description: Address immediate code review findings before other agents continue: correct /proc/iomem inclusive-to-exclusive range handling and regression tests, align README/package comments with skeleton status and upload scope, and update OpenSpec task status for completed foundation/parser work.
close_reason: Fixed review blockers: corrected iomem inclusive-to-exclusive conversion and tests, aligned docs/comments with skeleton scope, updated OpenSpec task status, and verified go test/go vet/race/OpenSpec.

title: Phase 1: /proc/iomem Parser
description: Implement AVML-compatible /proc/iomem parser with System RAM filtering, hex range parsing, permission-denied detection (0-0), merge/split utilities, and fixture-driven tests matching AVML expected ranges.
close_reason: Completed: /proc/iomem parser with System RAM filtering, top-level line detection, 0-0 permission-denied check, merge/split utilities, and all 5 AVML fixture tests pass

title: Phase 0: Repository Foundation
description: Initialize go.mod, create all package skeletons (cmd/, internal/, pkg/), add fixtures, .gitignore, README, and shared phys.Range types with tests. All packages compile and go test ./... passes.
close_reason: Completed: go.mod initialized, all package skeletons created, phys.Range with tests added, README and .gitignore updated, go test ./... passes

title: Add Makefile cross-build targets and MIT license
description: Add repository build automation for producing GOFVML binaries across common OS/architecture targets and record the project license as MIT.
acceptance_criteria: Makefile can build local binaries and cross-compiled release binaries; MIT LICENSE file exists; quality checks pass.
close_reason: Added Makefile build and cross-build targets, MIT license, README license link, and ignored generated build directories.

title: Task 14: Metadata Sidecars and Operator Guidance
description: Define physical metadata sidecar schema, implement optional sidecar writing, add operator diagnostics for Linux lockdown, strict devmem, missing sources, Yama ptrace scope, etc.
close_reason: Implemented physical metadata sidecar schema with JSON serialization, operator diagnostics for Linux lockdown, strict devmem, missing sources, Yama ptrace scope, dumpability, namespaces, and preflight checks. All tests pass.

title: Task 15: Validation Suite
description: Add comprehensive unit and integration tests, fuzz tests, privileged validation scripts, race detector guidance, and large-file validation strategy.
close_reason: Added fuzz tests for iomem and procfs parsers, malformed image header tests, conversion round-trip integration tests, upload integration tests with local HTTP server, and validation documentation. All 22 packages pass go test ./...
